title: tragus biflorus
intro: Tragus biflorus, also known as the Otolepis, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragus biflorus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
